mapper.select: select r.report_id as reportId, r.period_id as periodId, r.emp_id as empId, r.avg_performance as avgPerformance, r.avg_expertise as avgExpertise, r.avg_teamwork as avgTeamwork, r.avg_attitude as avgAttitude, r.avg_growth as avgGrowth, r.overall_score as overallScore, r.grade as grade, r.ai_summary as aiSummary, r.sentiment_positive as sentimentPositive, r.sentiment_neutral as sentimentNeutral, r.sentiment_negative as sentimentNegative, r.sentiment_label as sentimentLabel, r.model_name as modelName, TO_CHAR(r.generated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as generatedAt, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt, p.title as periodTitle, p.eval_year as periodYear, p.eval_term as periodTerm, emp.emp_name as empName, emp.emp_no as empNo, dept.dept_name as deptName, pos.pos_name as posName from evaluation_ai_report r join evaluation_period p on r.period_id = p.period_id join employee emp on r.emp_id = emp.emp_id join department dept on emp.dept_id = dept.dept_id join emp_position pos on emp.pos_id = pos.pos_id where r.period_id = #{periodId} and p.com_id = #{comId} order by r.overall_score desc, pos.pos_order, emp.emp_no

select r.report_id as reportId, r.period_id as periodId, r.emp_id as empId, r.avg_performance as avgPerformance, r.avg_expertise as avgExpertise, r.avg_teamwork as avgTeamwork, r.avg_attitude as avgAttitude, r.avg_growth as avgGrowth, r.overall_score as overallScore, r.grade as grade, r.ai_summary as aiSummary, r.sentiment_positive as sentimentPositive, r.sentiment_neutral as sentimentNeutral, r.sentiment_negative as sentimentNegative, r.sentiment_label as sentimentLabel, r.model_name as modelName, TO_CHAR(r.generated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as generatedAt, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt, p.title as periodTitle, p.eval_year as periodYear, p.eval_term as periodTerm, emp.emp_name as empName, emp.emp_no as empNo, dept.dept_name as deptName, pos.pos_name as posName from evaluation_ai_report r join evaluation_period p on r.period_id = p.period_id join employee emp on r.emp_id = emp.emp_id join department dept on emp.dept_id = dept.dept_id join emp_position pos on emp.pos_id = pos.pos_id where r.report_id = #{reportId} and p.com_id = #{comId}

select r.report_id as reportId, r.period_id as periodId, r.emp_id as empId, r.avg_performance as avgPerformance, r.avg_expertise as avgExpertise, r.avg_teamwork as avgTeamwork, r.avg_attitude as avgAttitude, r.avg_growth as avgGrowth, r.overall_score as overallScore, r.grade as grade, r.ai_summary as aiSummary, r.sentiment_positive as sentimentPositive, r.sentiment_neutral as sentimentNeutral, r.sentiment_negative as sentimentNegative, r.sentiment_label as sentimentLabel, r.model_name as modelName, TO_CHAR(r.generated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as generatedAt, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as updatedAt, p.title as periodTitle, p.eval_year as periodYear, p.eval_term as periodTerm, emp.emp_name as empName, emp.emp_no as empNo, dept.dept_name as deptName, pos.pos_name as posName from evaluation_ai_report r join evaluation_period p on r.period_id = p.period_id join employee emp on r.emp_id = emp.emp_id join department dept on emp.dept_id = dept.dept_id join emp_position pos on emp.pos_id = pos.pos_id where r.period_id = #{periodId} and r.emp_id = #{empId}

select r.report_id as reportId, r.period_id as periodId, r.emp_id as empId, r.overall_score as overallScore, r.grade as grade, r.sentiment_label as sentimentLabel, TO_CHAR(r.generated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as generatedAt, p.title as periodTitle, p.eval_year as periodYear, p.eval_term as periodTerm from evaluation_ai_report r join evaluation_period p on r.period_id = p.period_id where r.emp_id = #{empId} order by p.eval_year desc, case p.eval_term when 'ANNUAL' then 3 when 'H2' then 2 when 'H1' then 1 end desc
select count(*) from evaluation_ai_report where period_id = #{periodId}
mapper.insert: insert into evaluation_ai_report ( report_id, period_id, emp_id, avg_performance, avg_expertise, avg_teamwork, avg_attitude, avg_growth, overall_score, grade, ai_summary, sentiment_positive, sentiment_neutral, sentiment_negative, sentiment_label, model_name, generated_at ) values ( SEQ_REPORT.nextval, #{periodId}, #{empId}, #{avgPerformance}, #{avgExpertise}, #{avgTeamwork}, #{avgAttitude}, #{avgGrowth}, #{overallScore}, #{grade}, #{aiSummary}, #{sentimentPositive}, #{sentimentNeutral}, #{sentimentNegative}, #{sentimentLabel}, #{modelName}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: update evaluation_ai_report set avg_performance = #{avgPerformance}, avg_expertise = #{avgExpertise}, avg_teamwork = #{avgTeamwork}, avg_attitude = #{avgAttitude}, avg_growth = #{avgGrowth}, overall_score = #{overallScore}, grade = #{grade}, ai_summary = #{aiSummary}, sentiment_positive = #{sentimentPositive}, sentiment_neutral = #{sentimentNeutral}, sentiment_negative = #{sentimentNegative}, sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel}, model_name = #{modelName}, generated_at = SYSDATE where period_id = #{periodId} and emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.select: select emp.emp_id as "empId", emp.emp_name as "empName", emp.emp_no as "empNo", dept.dept_name as "deptName", pos.pos_name as "posName", round(avg(pe.score_performance), 2) as "avgPerformance", round(avg(pe.score_expertise), 2) as "avgExpertise", round(avg(pe.score_teamwork), 2) as "avgTeamwork", round(avg(pe.score_attitude), 2) as "avgAttitude", round(avg(pe.score_growth), 2) as "avgGrowth", count(*) as "evalCount", listagg(SUBSTR(pe.strength_comment, 1, 200), ' / ') within group (order by pe.eval_id) as "allStrengthComments", listagg(SUBSTR(pe.improvement_comment, 1, 200), ' / ') within group (order by pe.eval_id) as "allImprovementComments" from performance_evaluation pe join employee emp on pe.target_emp_id = emp.emp_id join department dept on emp.dept_id = dept.dept_id join emp_position pos on emp.pos_id = pos.pos_id where pe.period_id = #{periodId} and pe.eval_status = 'SUBMITTED' group by emp.emp_id, emp.emp_name, emp.emp_no, dept.dept_name, pos.pos_name, pos.pos_order order by pos.pos_order, emp.emp_no
